creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to yuri from comment #13)

Building on 11a on a loaded host says:

Error: /usr/local/bin/bazel is linked to /usr/local/lib/libc++.so.1 from devel/libc++ but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need LIB_DEPENDS+=libc++.so:devel/libc++

Is this valid ?
